data.title: Here are the major earnings after the close today
data.description:
Major earnings expected after the bell on Thursday include:

  • Netflix (NFLX)
  • Marten Transport Ltd. (MRTN)
  • Bank OZK (OZK)
  • Interactive Brokers Group (IBKR)

Other earnings slated for release after Thursday's close include:

  • FNB, WAL, WT
  • For Seeking Alpha's full earnings season calendar, click here.

data.title: Monarch Casino jumps to 52-week high after strong earnings report
data.description:
Monarch Casino & Resort (NASDAQ:MCRI) soared in early trading on Thursday after reporting record financial results for Q2. Revenue rose 6.8% year-over-year to $136.9 million, with casino revenues up 12.1%. Net income grew 19.1% to $27 million, equating to diluted earnings per share of $1.44, a 21% increase over last year. Adjusted EBITDA rose 16.8% to $51.3 million. 

Notably, the casino company maintained a strong balance sheet with $71.6 million in cash at the end of the quarter and no borrowings, declared a $0.30 per share dividend, and repurchased $19.8 million in shares.

Truist Securities analyst Barry Jonas said the firm continues to favor Monarch Casino (NASDAQ:MCRI) with its best-in-class assets and strong balance sheet. The firm boosted its price target to $120 from $105 and raised 2025-2026 EBITDA estimates. 

"Mgmt plans to continue to buyback shares opportunistically. With net leverage at around zero (amongst the best in our coverage) MCRI is well positioned for M&A, share repurchases and/or a special dividend. That said, mgmt noted that the M&A environment remains challenged but will continue to evaluate gaming and even non-gaming targets as well," highlighted Jonas.

Jefferies analyst David Katz said the better than expected results for MCRI are driven by the early impact from the Reno rooms renovation, which should continue to ramp going forward. "With the addition of the momentum in Black Hawk, the company is uniquely positioned to continue generating same-store growth," he added.

Shares of Monarch Casino & Resort (MCRI) were up 23.6% at 9:58 a.m. to trade a new all-time high.

data.title: Fubo to now offer 'Newsmax en Español'
data.description:
• Newsmax (NYSE:NMAX) said Wednesday it has expanded its partnership with Fubo (NYSE:FUBO) for the live TV streaming platform to carry "Newsmax en Español" while continuing the distribution of Newsmax in English.
  • The network said Newsmax en Español will use advanced AI technology to dub its content into another language on a live basis and will launch on Fubo's Latino plan and Latino Plus add-on package.
  • Financial terms of the distribution expansion agreement were not disclosed.
  • Newsmax in English will continue to be available on Fubo's base Pro plan.
  • Source: Press Release

data.title: Verisk acquires SuranceBay for $162.5M
data.description:
Data analytics and technology provider Verisk Analytics (NASDAQ:VRSK) announced on Thursday the acquisition of SuranceBay for a cash consideration of $162.5M.

SuranceBay provides producer licensing, onboarding, appointment, and compliance solutions for the life and annuity industry.

Details about the acquisition and its impact on the financial results will be provided during the second quarter earnings conference call.

data.title: Mammoth Resources upsizes private placement to $980K
data.description:
• Mammoth Resources (TSXV:MTH:CA) increased its private placement from 30M to 39M units, raising gross proceeds of up to $980,000 (up from $750,000).
  • Each $0.025 unit includes one common share and one-half warrant, with each full warrant exercisable at $0.05 for 18 months post-closing.
  • Proceeds will be allocated 60% to advancing the Tenoriba precious metal project in Mexico and evaluating acquisitions, and 40% to working capital.
  • Securities will be subject to a four-month hold period.
  • Source: Press release

data.title: I-Mab to buy Bridge Health Biotech
data.description:
I-Mab (NASDAQ:IMAB) said on Thursday that it has signed an agreement to acquire Bridge Health Biotech.

As part of the deal, I-Mab will provide an initial payment of $1.8M to Bridge Health shareholders, along with additional payments totaling $1.2M scheduled through 2027.

This acquisition grants I-Mab upstream rights to the CLDN18.2 parental antibody, which will be utilized in various bispecific and multi-specific applications.

Furthermore, the deal removes all royalty obligations and decreases future milestone payments related to givastomig that I-Mab owes to Bridge Health.

Bridge Health shareholders also stand to gain from potential milestone payments that could reach up to $3.875M, contingent upon meeting specific development and regulatory targets.

The company said that the deal is anticipated to be finalized in the third quarter of 2025.

data.title: ONAR to acquire Retina.ai
data.description:
• ONAR Holding (OTCQB:ONAR) announced a definitive agreement to acquire Retina.ai, a marketing intelligence platform specializing in early customer value prediction.
  • Retina.ai will be merged with Cortex, ONAR’s in-house predictive analytics platform under its ONAR Labs venture studio.
  • The integration will enable ONAR agencies to forecast customer lifetime value and campaign return-on-investment before launching marketing efforts.
  • Key benefits include real-time profitability prediction, SaaS revenue expansion, and enhanced data unification for client insights.
  • Financial terms of the deal were not disclosed.
  • Source: Press release

data.title: ArcBest announces retirement of CEO Judy McReynolds
data.description:
• ArcBest (NASDAQ:ARCB) on Thursday announced that Judy McReynolds will retire as chief executive officer effective December 31, 2025.
  • The company’s president, Seth Runser, will succeed McReynolds on January 1, 2026.
  • Runser will retain his role as president and has also been appointed to the board effective the same date. McReynolds will continue to serve as chairman of the board.
  • Source: Press Release

data.title: Syra Health secures up to $2.1M contract to provide medical management nurses
data.description:
• Syra Health (OTC:SYRA) on Thursday said it has been awarded a new contract with a major insurance provider to staff registered nurses to support specific health plans.
  • Under the one-year agreement, worth up to $2.1 million, Syra Health will provide medical management nurses to work with healthcare providers and plan members.
  • Source: Press Release

data.title: Navigator launches joint venture to build two ammonia gas carriers
data.description:
Navigator Holdings (NYSE:NVGS) +1.9% pre-market Thursday after saying it formed a joint venture with Amon Maritime to construct two 51,530 cubic meter ammonia-fueled carriers at an average cost of $84M per vessel.

Each vessel project received a NOK 90M (~$9M) grant from the Enova Norwegian government agency; the JV will finance the majority through commercial bank financing, with remaining capital contributed by Navigator (NYSE:NVGS) and Amon Maritime.

The vessels will operate under five-year time charters with a "blue-chip industry leader," with deliveries scheduled for June and October 2028, the companies said.

Navigator (NVGS) will own ~80% of the Navigator Amon Shipping joint venture, with Amon Maritime holding the remaining ~20%.
